candidates.why: Exact top-line revenue label; matches Net revenue values and is in the candidate list.
Also a valid revenue label in the preview, but not in the preferred candidate list; could serve as an alternate if labels changed across years.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit revenue line from the candidate list. Although 'Net revenue' is also present and numerically identical, one revenue label is sufficient and later code will not sum revenue rows.

candidates.why: Direct cost line and the clearest COGS label; populated across the preview.
Alternate COGS label, but appears redundant/less complete than 'Cost of goods sold'.
Related to cost of sales but is an impairment, not recurring core COGS.

variables.notes: Chose the primary direct-cost line. Excluded 'Impairment in cost of sales' because impairments are not core recurring COGS.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A overhead component from the candidate list.
Clear overhead bucket from the candidate list.
Operating overhead component visible in the income statement preview, but missing from the preferred candidate list.
Possible overhead component, but appears small and mixed with non-core items; less central than the main overhead rows.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the best operating overhead component rows. Included 'Warehousing and distribution costs' from outside the candidate list because the candidate list clearly misses this major overhead component shown above operating profit. Excluded amortization/depreciation rows and excluded 'Other Operating Expenses' because it appears mixed with small/non-core items. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Warehousing and distribution costs

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Contains R&D wording but is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated current-period R&D expense line is visible in the income statement. The only R&D-related income-statement row is amortization, which should be excluded from XRD.

candidates.why: Recurring financing cost component for lease liabilities.
Possible recurring finance-cost component; small but finance-related.
Possible recurring finance-cost component; small but finance-related.
Total finance expense line, but likely includes FX and other non-interest items; less preferred than components.

variables.notes: Preferred granular recurring finance-cost components over the total 'Financial expenses' row to avoid including exchange-rate items. Excluded 'Financial expenses' to prevent double counting and excluded FX-related rows.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, per the equity rule.
Usable fallback only if no parent/owner equity line existed; here it is redundant with the preferred parent-equity line.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to parent company shareholders

variables.notes: Selected parent-only equity to avoid double counting any minority interest.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet NCI label, but no values are shown and parent equity equals total equity.
Alternate NCI label, but no values are shown and parent equity equals total equity.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to exist. 'Equity attributable to parent company shareholders' equals 'Total Equity', so MIB should be treated as zero.
